steps.t: Ingold can be found at the Ruins of Díngarth. You should speak with Ingold to learn anything you can about Sapakár.
You should travel to the last known location of Sapakár.
Sapakár can be found somewhere in Barad-dûr. You should seek out Sapakár.
Sapakár can be found deep within the bones of Barad-dûr. You should seek out Sapakár.
Sapakár can be found somewhere in Barad-dûr. You should confront Sapakár.
